description: Style NoteThis piece from mother earth references the brand's environmentally sound principles into it's overall aesthetic. Capturing India's rich textile traditions in designs and styles that reflect the sentiment of the global citizen - this is the brand's USP. This top is crafted from a soft fabric that's passed through the hands of rural weavers and craftsmen, who've used time tested traditions passed on from generation to generation to craft this unique piece. Pair this with denims or jeggings with chunky bangles to create the right impact.Product DetailsPink strappy top, has a square neck, an orange yoke with pintucks and a buttoned placket, adjustable shoulder straps, smocking at the back chest and flaring pintucks below the bustMaterial and Care100% cottonHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironDo not soak in waterSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
